title: Seed of Renewal
description: A mysterious sickness has struck several villagers in Dalhurst, resisting all conventional healing. The Priestess of Gaela believes only the legendary Seed of Renewal can save them - a rare artifact blessed by the goddess herself. The seed grows in a dangerous location deep within Willow Dale ruins, guarded by ancient protectors who do not take kindly to intruders.

objectives.description: Travel deep into Willow Dale ruins
Defeat the ancient guardians protecting the seed
Bring the seed to Priestess of Gaela
